quienes_somos_texto: We are a coffee shop dedicated to providing unique experiences, combining specialty coffee, premium ambiance, and artisan passion.
mision_texto: To offer high-quality products and create memorable moments for every customer in a cozy and modern space.
vision_texto: To become a reference for premium coffee shops, recognized for our innovation, style, and excellence.
parrafo_historia_1: Our story at Mr. Coffee is born from a deep passion for artisanal coffee and the desire to pay a sincere tribute to our roots in the highlands of Alto Yapaz. It is there, among the mystical mist, the perfect climate, and the rich biodiversity of its mountains, where we cultivate our beans with dedication and respect for nature, ensuring that every cup we serve is an authentic reflection of this exceptional land.
parrafo_historia_2: We seek to combine the indomitable soul of local coffee cultivation with an elegant and avant-garde design, making the richness of this land feel in a truly unique environment. At Mr. Coffee, every detail is designed so that our customers not only enjoy a superior quality coffee but also live an experience that connects with the essence of our history and coffee culture.
parrafo_historia_3: The end result translates into a perfect cup where the aroma evokes the raw freshness of our mountains, the flavor pays homage to the history of its production, and the warm atmosphere invites you to share unforgettable moments. At Mr. Coffee, every sip is a journey to the roots of our coffee, a celebration of the passion and effort behind every bean, and an invitation to enjoy life with every cup.
catalogo_descripcion: Discover artisanal products made with passion, intense aroma, and a premium experience.
descripcion_cafe_blend: Coffee that unites the best of each bean to balance acidity, body, or aromatic nuances.
descripcion_cafe_blend_granos: Combination of different beans to soften defects and enhance virtues.
descripcion_cafe_gourmet: Coffee from manual and selective harvesting of ripe fruits.
descripcion_cafe_pergamino: Intermediate state of the coffee bean, with the husk removed but unpolished.
descripcion_cacao_en_polvo: Intense bitter flavor, brown color, and fine texture.
descripcion_pasta_de_cacao: Pure cocoa mass with a rich chocolate flavor and smooth texture.
descripcion_cascarilla_de_cacao: Cocoa husk with a mild chocolate aroma, ideal for infusions and culinary uses.
descripcion_nibs_de_cacao: Cocoa nibs with an intense chocolate flavor and crunchy texture, perfect for baking and gourmet recipes.
descripcion_miel_de_abeja: Natural artisanal honey with a smooth and sweet flavor.
disponible_miel_de_abeja: Available in 300 ml, 500 ml, and 1 L jars.
descripcion_sal_de_grano_fino: Natural fine salt ideal for gourmet cooking, quick dissolution in liquids, and ease of adhering to foods.
descripcion_sal_de_grano_semigrueso: Provides a crunchy texture, retains moisture in meats, and preserves a higher amount of natural minerals.
descripcion_sal_de_grano_grueso: Not recommended for food, used to relieve knee and joint pain.
experiencia_texto: Each cup of coffee holds stories, effort, and passion. Discover the journey that makes your best moment possible.
seleccionamos_mejor_texto: We choose the highest quality beans from lands that provide excellence.
tostamos_pasion_texto: We enhance the unique aromas and flavors of each bean with artisanal roasting.
preparamos_experiencia_texto: Each preparation is an art made with dedication to offer you the best.
creamos_momentos_texto: More than coffee, we create memories and moments that stay with you.
del_origen_texto: We traverse each stage of the process to ensure you enjoy an authentic experience full of flavor.
estamos_para_ayudarte: We Are Here to Help You
texto_consultas: Our team is available to answer your questions, provide recommendations, and assist you with our coffees and experiences.
texto_telefono: Call us at 970 574 136 for quick inquiries and reservations. We are here to provide you with the best coffee experience.
texto_horarios: We are open from 10:00 AM to 10:00 PM. Check the availability of our experiences.
texto_productos_premium: Discover our artisanal coffees, special methods, and exclusive editions.
ubicacion_descripcion: Live the Mr. Coffee experience in an elegant, cozy atmosphere designed to enjoy every cup.
direccion: 720 Los Pioneros Avenue, La Merced 12856, Peru
descripcion: A first-class experience, artisan culture, and a unique atmosphere.
